item.title: Scott Bessent Says 'We Will Follow The Money' As US Sanctions $344M From Iran-Linked Crypto Wallets
item.description: The US Treasury sanctioned multiple crypto wallets tied to Iran today, one day after stablecoin issuer Tether froze roughly $344 million in (CRYPTO: U...

item.title: The Chip Stock Rally That Broke History: SOXX Notches Record 17-Day Win Streak
